questions.question: Given a time series data in a Pandas Series, write a vectorized operation to extract the month and year from each date. If the date is in the format 'YYYY-MM-DD', assume it is a datetime object. Assume there are only valid dates in the data.
questions.hint: Use the pandas to_datetime function and the dt.to_period function

questions.question: Suppose you have a dictionary where the keys are column names and the values are lists of strings containing data. Write a vectorized operation using Pandas to convert all strings to lowercase and then to title case. Finally, convert the column names to lowercase.
questions.hint: Use the map function and the str.lower and str.title methods

questions.question: A Pandas DataFrame has the following columns: 'Date', 'Value'. The 'Date' column is of datetime type and the 'Value' column is of numeric type. Write a vectorized operation using Pandas to extract the year from each date and create a new column 'Year'.
